L1.head: Integrating non-Hermitian topological photonics with dynamic symmetry-breaking control
L1.tail: overcoming chromatic aberration and diffraction limits in terahertz imaging
L1.claim: 集成非厄米特拓扑光子学与动态对称破缺控制使得克服色差和衍射极限成为可能

L1.head: overcoming chromatic aberration and diffraction limits
L1.tail: achieving real-time super-resolution imaging without cryogenic cooling
L1.claim: 克服色差和衍射极限使得无需低温冷却的实时超分辨率成像成为可能

L2.head: hybrid metasurface combining topological edge states and PT-symmetric gain-loss domains
L2.claim: 混合超表面设计支持亚波长聚焦

L2.head: subwavelength focusing
L2.claim: 亚波长聚焦依赖于异常点工程

L3.head: actively tuning the EP degeneracy via optoelectric feedback
L3.tail: compression of the point spread function (PSF) below λ/5
L3.claim: 主动调谐EP简并度导致点扩散函数压缩至λ/5以下

L3.head: actively tuning the EP degeneracy via optoelectric feedback
L3.tail: compensation of chromatic dispersion across a 0.1–3 THz bandwidth
L3.claim: 主动调谐EP简并度实现0.1–3 THz带宽内的色散补偿

L3.head: compression of PSF below λ/5 and compensation of chromatic dispersion
L3.claim: PSF压缩与色散补偿共同促成实时超分辨率成像
